title: Bossi Oscillating Intervals
description: VO2max via variable-intensity within each interval
purpose: VO2max via variable-intensity within each interval

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/6. 1:30 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 90% FTP for 1:30. 90-95 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/6. 1:30 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 90% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 120%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/30. Duration: 0:30. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/30. You're building something real here. 28 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/30. Only 28 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/6. 120%, 90-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 18% complete. Block 1/6. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 90% at 90-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/6.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/6. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 1:30 at 90%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 27 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/30. You're 20% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/30. 26 to go. You've accumulated 3min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/30. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/6. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/30. 120% FTP. Keep 90-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/6. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 25 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 1:00 at 90%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/6. 1:00 at 90%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/6.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 21% into session. Seated at 90-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:30 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:30. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:30 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 23% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 1:30 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 5min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 95-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2/6. 90% for 1:30. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/6. 46 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 30s at 120%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 7/30. 120% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7/30. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7/30. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into session. 120% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 30% complete. Block 2/6. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% through session. Block 2/6. You've done 7min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 1:30 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/6. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/6. 90% FTP, 95-100 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9/30. You're 32% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/30. Duration: 0:30. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9/30. You're building something real here. 21 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9/30. Only 21 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 9/30. 120% FTP × 0:30. Seated. 21 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 1:00 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/6. 90% at 95-100 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/6. 1:00 at 90%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2: 90% for 1:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 21 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 2/6.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:30 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:30. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 25 minutes of threshold work done. Block 3/6. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 10min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 3: 1:30 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 3/6. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/6. 38 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 120% FTP × 0:30. After rest, expect 90% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 120% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 36 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 90% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 17 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 43% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 120% for 30s. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 1min at 90%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 43% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 43% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. 120% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 44% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 35 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 29 minutes in. 90% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 44% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 15 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 44% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 2:30. Then 32min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 2:30.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 31 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 32 minutes in. 90% at 90-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 14 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 120% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 29 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 34 minutes in. 90% at 90-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 12 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 55% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 120% FTP × 0:30. After rest, expect 90% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 55% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 55% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. 120% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 56% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 27 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 90% at 90-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 56% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 10 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 56% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 57% done. 0 intervals left. 25 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:30. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 2:30. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% complete. Block 5/6. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 20min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 90-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% complete. Block 5/6. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 9 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 61% complete. 90% for 1:30. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 8 reps left. 23 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 63% complete. 120% for 30s. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 22/30. You're building something real here. 8 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 22/30. You've accumulated 21min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 7 blocks left. 21 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 5/6. 64% complete. Hold 90% steady. 21 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% into session. Seated at 90-100 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 43 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% through session. Rep 24/30. You've done 23min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 6 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 6 intervals left. 21 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% through. 90% at 90-100 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 67% through session. Block 5/6. You've done 24min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 20 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 5/6. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 69% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 17 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 6/6. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 4 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 47 minutes in. 90% at 90-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 4 blocks to go. 16 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 6: 1:30 at 90%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 4 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 27/30. You're 75% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 27/30. 30s at 120%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 3 reps left. 15 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 49 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 27/30. 120% FTP × 0:30. Seated. 3 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 49 minutes of threshold work done. Block 6/6. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 6/6. 76% complete. Hold 90% steady. 14 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 76% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 14 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 6/6. 14 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 29/30. 51 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 29: 120% FTP. You're 51 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 51 minutes of work done. 13 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 120% for 0:30. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 90% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 1:00 at 90%. Then 12min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 1:00 at 90%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 12min to contemplate your life choices. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 90% × 1:00. Give it everything. 12min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 52 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 52 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% for 10:00. Finish strong.
